title: Categorical Feature Frequencies
objective: Summarize frequency patterns in clinically important categorical and ordinal predictors.
method: Computed and plotted value counts for sex, chest pain type, fasting blood sugar, resting ECG, exercise angina, slope, ca, thal, and site.
results: Generated value counts for 9 categorical/ordinal fields.
Chest pain type and source site show strong class-relevant structure in later analyses.
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
